description: Receiver defines one or more notification integrations.

discordConfigs.description: discordConfigs defines the list of Discord configurations.

emailConfigs.description: emailConfigs defines the list of Email configurations.

msteamsConfigs.description: msteamsConfigs defines the list of MSTeams configurations. It requires Alertmanager >= 0.26.0.

msteamsv2Configs.description: msteamsv2Configs defines the list of MSTeamsV2 configurations. It requires Alertmanager >= 0.28.0.

name.description: name defines the name of the receiver. Must be unique across all items from the list.

opsgenieConfigs.description: opsgenieConfigs defines the list of OpsGenie configurations.

pagerdutyConfigs.description: pagerdutyConfigs defines the List of PagerDuty configurations.

pushoverConfigs.description: pushoverConfigs defines the list of Pushover configurations.

rocketchatConfigs.description: rocketchatConfigs defines the list of RocketChat configurations. It requires Alertmanager >= 0.28.0.

slackConfigs.description: slackConfigs defines the list of Slack configurations.

snsConfigs.description: snsConfigs defines the list of SNS configurations

telegramConfigs.description: telegramConfigs defines the list of Telegram configurations.

victoropsConfigs.description: victoropsConfigs defines the list of VictorOps configurations.

webexConfigs.description: webexConfigs defines the list of Webex configurations.

webhookConfigs.description: webhookConfigs defines the List of webhook configurations.

wechatConfigs.description: wechatConfigs defines the list of WeChat configurations.
